column1: どんな権力者といえども、法の前では平等だ。
column2: どんなけんりょくしゃといえども、ほうのまえではびょうどうだ。
column3: Even the most powerful person must be equal before the law.
column4: といえども (even if, although, even ~ must — concessive formal)
column6: formal concessive; even granting the status or condition named, the stated rule or reality still applies
column8: といえども = formal even-if concession; にしても = even if (same, less literary); とはいえ = although (same nuance); であっても = even being
column10: module:05-n1 jlpt:n1 point:といえども source:authored scaffold:pending-audio
